author: y4rr
content: Done. 9 edits in total: rust-fix-discipline (Step 2 header FOUR→THREE, Step 2 intro 'four→three', Step 2 Category D removed and replaced with 'What if the right fix can't be applied unilaterally?' section directing to Step 4 coordination + escalation patterns, Step 1 item 7 wording fix, Step 3 #12 forbidden pattern 'deferral as escape hatch' added, Step 5 cost-of-implementation paragraph, Step 7 template Category line A|B|C only, Step 8 vocabulary 'Cannot proceed' + 'Filed Step 4 coordination block' replacing 'Deferred', frontmatter description). rust-gpu-discipline §3 has new 'Defer-for-coordination is itself a §3 violation when PyTorch has a clear answer' subsection naming the 4 specific historical defer-failures by example. Skill description in available-skills list now reads 'defer is forbidden' verbatim. Test ADR #2 to verify subagent behavior change next.
